top_signals.title: UAE says new pipeline that will bypass Strait of Hormuz is nearly 50% complete
top_signals.summary: The UAE has redirected some oil exports through an existing pipeline to Fujairah, which has a maximum capacity of 1.8 million barrels per day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Jeff Bezos says bottom half of earners should pay zero in income taxes
top_signals.summary: Amazon Executive Chairman Jeff Bezos on Wednesday called for zero federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
